zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger II De Wavrin於大約1085年出生在法國諾爾德瓦福林時，他的父親Baudouin DE WAVRIN21歲，母親Éstelle de Bailleul24歲。他和Emme DE LILLERS至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1155年在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger II De Wavrin于大约1085年出生在法国諾爾德瓦福林时，他的父亲Baudouin DE WAVRIN21岁，母亲Éstelle de Bailleul24岁。他和Emme DE LILLERS至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1155年在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦福林享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger II De Wavrin was born about 1085, in Wavrin, Nord, France, his father, Baudouin DE WAVRIN, was 21 and his mother, Éstelle de Bailleul, was 24. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Emme DE LILLERS. He died in 1155, in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger II De Wavrin est né environ 1085, à Wavrin, Nord, France, son père, Baudouin DE WAVRIN, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Éstelle de Bailleul, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Emme DE LILLERS. Il est décédé en 1155, à Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger II De Wavrin um 1085 in Wavrin, Nord, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin DE WAVRIN 21 und seine Mutter Éstelle de Bailleul 24. Er hatte mit Emme DE LILLERS mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1155 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger II De Wavrin è nato il circa 1085 nel Wavrin, Nord, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin DE WAVRIN, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Éstelle de Bailleul, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Emme DE LILLERS. Morì nel 1155, nel Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger II De Wavrinが約1085年にフランスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Baudouin DE WAVRINは21歳，母Éstelle de Bailleulは24歳であった。彼はEmme DE LILLERSとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1155年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードワvリンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger II De Wavrin(이)가 대략 1085년 프랑스 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin DE WAVRIN(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Éstelle de Bailleul(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Emme DE LILLERS(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1155년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 와브린에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger II De Wavrin nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Wavrin, Nord, França, seu pai, Baudouin DE WAVRIN, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Éstelle de Bailleul, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Emme DE LILLERS. Ele faleceu em 1155, em Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger II De Wavrin родился около 1085 г. в местности ваврин, норд, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin DE WAVRIN было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Éstelle de Bailleul, 24. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Emme DE LILLERS. Он умер в 1155 г. в местности ваврин, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger II De Wavrin nació aproximadamente 1085, en Wavrin, Nord, Francia, su papá, Baudouin DE WAVRIN, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Éstelle de Bailleul, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Emme DE LILLERS. Murió en 1155, en Wavrin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
